// <auto-generated/>
#nullable enable

using Microsoft.Extensions.DependencyInjection;
using System.Linq;

namespace MainApp
{
    /// <summary>
    /// Extension methods for registering services from MainApp.
    /// </summary>
    public static class MainAppServiceCollectionExtensions
    {
        /// <summary>
        /// Registers all default services.
        /// </summary>
        public static IServiceCollection AddMainApp(this IServiceCollection services)
        {
            services.AddSingleton<global::MainApp.ViewModel2, global::MainApp.ViewModel2>();

            return services;
        }

        /// <summary>
        /// Registers all services tagged with 'Mediator'.
        /// </summary>
        public static IServiceCollection AddMainApp_Mediator(this IServiceCollection services)
        {
            services.AddSingleton(typeof(global::MainApp.GenericRequestHandler2<>), typeof(global::MainApp.GenericRequestHandler2<>));
            services.AddSingleton<global::MainApp.GenericRequestHandler2<global::MainApp.Entity2>, global::MainApp.GenericRequestHandler2<global::MainApp.Entity2>>();
            services.AddSingleton<global::SharedModule.IRequestHandler<global::MainApp.GenericRequest2<global::MainApp.Entity2>, global::System.Collections.Generic.List<global::MainApp.Entity2>>>((global::System.IServiceProvider sp) => sp.GetRequiredService<global::MainApp.GenericRequestHandler2<global::MainApp.Entity2>>());

            return services;
        }
    }
}
